title: Lesson 357: 合わせる, 哀れ, 案...

items.gloss: to match (rhythm, speed, etc.); to join together; to unite; to combine; to add up; to face; to be opposite (someone); to compare; to check with; to cause to meet (e.g. an unpleasant fate); to place together; to connect; to overlap; to mix; to put blade to blade; to fight
pity; sorrow; grief; misery; compassion; pathos; pitiable; pitiful; pathetic; miserable; alack; alas
idea; plan; proposal; suggestion; (government) bill; draft; rough copy; expectation; desk; stand
stomach; Chinese "stomach" constellation (one of the 28 mansions)
